active_grants.name: ESTCP FY 2027
active_grants.resolution: Spectroscopy deferred to Phase 2 per VP Engineering decision (March 14, 2026). Phase 1 proceeds with SDI-12/NDVI validation only.
active_grants.notes: 8 days to submission. Technical specification complete. Blocker cleared by scope decision. T-5 watch active (March 21). No action required unless new blockers emerge.
